name: HP LaserJet Pro MFP M428fdw
description: High-performance multifunction laser printer with wireless connectivity, automatic duplex printing, and fast print speeds up to 40 ppm. Perfect for busy office environments.

name: HP 58A Black LaserJet Toner Cartridge
description: Original HP toner cartridge delivering consistent, professional-quality results page after page. Yields approximately 3,000 pages.

name: HP 63XL Tri-Color Ink Cartridge
description: High-yield tri-color ink cartridge for vibrant, true-to-life color prints. Compatible with HP DeskJet, ENVY, and OfficeJet series printers.

name: Typek A4 Printing Paper (5 Reams)
description: Premium quality 80gsm white A4 paper. Box of 5 reams (2,500 sheets). Ideal for high-volume printing and everyday office use.

name: Rexel Odyssey Heavy Duty Stapler
description: Professional heavy-duty stapler capable of stapling up to 60 sheets at once. Ergonomic design with all-metal construction for durability.

name: Handy Andy Industrial Cleaning Detergent 5L
description: Concentrated multi-surface industrial cleaner suitable for offices, factories, and commercial spaces. Powerful formula removes grease and grime.

name: HP OfficeJet Pro 9015e All-in-One Printer
description: Smart office all-in-one printer with advanced scanning, copying, and faxing capabilities. Features smart tasks and self-healing Wi-Fi.

name: Samsung MLT-D101S Black Toner
description: Genuine Samsung black toner cartridge with approximately 1,500-page yield. Produces sharp text and crisp graphics for professional documents.

name: BIC Cristal Ballpoint Pens (50 Pack)
description: Classic medium-point ballpoint pens in assorted colors. Smooth writing, long-lasting ink, and durable hexagonal barrel design.

name: Mr Muscle Multi-Surface Cleaner 750ml
description: Professional-grade multi-surface cleaner that cuts through grease and dirt. Safe for use on desks, glass, and kitchen surfaces.

name: Canon PIXMA G3420 MegaTank Printer
description: Refillable ink tank wireless printer with ultra-low running costs. Print up to 7,700 pages per bottle. Perfect for high-volume office printing.

name: Epson 664 EcoTank Ink Bottle Set
description: Set of 4 genuine Epson ink bottles (Black, Cyan, Magenta, Yellow) for EcoTank printers. Ultra-high page yield for cost-effective printing.
